summary: Full end-to-end testing of Renderlabs landing page (backend contact API + frontend UI). All 7 pytest backend tests pass, all 10 frontend flows (UI presence, navigation, lightbox, contact form -> DB, mobile menu, responsive) pass.

issues: Hero video is a large remote MP4 and may show a blank/gray frame while buffering on first load. Element has correct muted/autoplay/loop/playsInline attributes; per request, presence verified over full buffering. Consider adding a poster image to avoid the empty white area before playback begins.

action_items: Optional: add a poster image attribute on hero-video and work-item videos to avoid blank thumbnail during remote MP4 buffering.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS allow_credentials=True combined with allow_origins='*' is not spec-compliant; browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origin. Currently no auth/cookies are used so it works, but tighten when adding auth.
server.py: @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handlers.
Contact.jsx: axios error handler swallows server response (no console.error). Logging err.response?.data would help future debugging.
Hero/Work videos: no poster attribute -> empty rectangle until first frame buffers; UX regression on slow connections.

ContactSubmission stored with created_at as ISO string while model declares datetime; works because list endpoint re-parses, but mixing types is brittle - prefer storing native datetime via Motor or always serializing on read.
test_credentials: N/A - public landing page, no auth
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions with TEST_UI_ prefix were created via POST /api/contact during testing (persisted in MongoDB).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses Resend with key in /app/backend/.env; emails route to shamimchaudhary701@gmail.com (Resend test mode). POST /api/contact returns {status, email_sent, id}. GET /api/contact lists all submissions sorted desc. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://creative-ai-studio-217.preview.emergentagent.com. All required data-testid attributes (navbar, nav-link-*, nav-cta, nav-mobile-toggle, nav-mobile-link-*, hero, hero-video, hero-view-work, service-card-*, work, work-item-w1..w4, work-lightbox, work-lightbox-close, contact, contact-form, contact-input-name/email/message, contact-submit, contact-email, contact-phone, contact-instagram) are present and working.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All review_request items verified: contact validation (422), persistence via GET, all sections render, navbar sticky+shadow on scroll, smooth-scroll for all nav links + nav-cta + hero-view-work, exactly 4 services and 4 work items, lightbox open/close with playable video, contact form success toast + field clearing + DB count increment (5 -> 6), correct mailto/tel/instagram hrefs, mobile menu toggle opens nav links.
